title: Research Experience
subtitle: Girls Leadership
excerpt: As part of the AANHPI Youth Research Council, I co-led the first national study examining how culture and identity shape the leadership journeys of Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander girls and gender-expansive youth.

title: Sundays Studio
subtitle: Events & Partnerships
excerpt: At sundays, a wellness-focused nail care brand, I supported influencer and community events from planning through execution, coordinated logistics and on-site engagement, and helped drive digital marketing performance.

title: Pioneer Works
subtitle: Digital MarComm
excerpt: I worked as a Digital Marketing and Communications Intern at Pioneer Works, supporting newsletters, program pages, and social content that connected audiences to live cultural experiences.
